evals.prompt: In this project, never use `unwrap()` outside of tests. Always propagate with `?` or pattern-match the Result. Make sure every PR you open honours that. Capture this preference so you don't forget across sessions.
evals.expected_output: vestige preference add capturing the no-unwrap-outside-tests rule in the user's voice. Importance >=0.7 since it's a hard rule.

evals.prompt: I prefer that you keep CLI command modules under 80 lines each. If a command grows past that, split helpers out into a sibling module. Convention.
evals.expected_output: vestige preference add with body capturing the 80-line CLI module preference, importance ~0.6.

evals.prompt: house style: every `#[derive(Debug)]` should also derive `Clone` unless there's a reason not to. saves us going back to add it later.
